Releases.Name: Metro 2039
Releases.PlatformsFull: Xbox Series X|S, PC (Microsoft Windows), PlayStation 5
Releases.Summary:
METRO 2039 is the next landmark FPS from acclaimed storytellers, 4A Games. Journey into the dark heart of post-apocalyptic Moscow in a harrowing conflict for the very soul of the Metro.

The year is 2039. For a quarter century, the last survivors of nuclear war have been locked in bitter conflict deep in the Metro tunnels beneath the poisoned city of Moscow.

Now, finally, they have been united by a single leader, a fanatical Spartan known as Hunter. But this is no peace: Hunter’s Novoreich regime rules through propaganda and fear, subjugating the population in the name of a new war for the surface against a dark and terrifying enemy.

In the wilderness beyond the city, the reclusive Stranger is haunted by violent waking nightmares. When the ghosts of his past force him out of exile, he must undertake a harrowing journey into the shattered ruins of Moscow, to the one place he swore he’d never go. The Metro.

Experience the most shocking METRO adventure yet in a powerful single-player s…

Releases.Name: Persona 4 Revival
Releases.PlatformsFull: Xbox Series X|S, PC (Microsoft Windows), PlayStation 5
Releases.Summary: Who’s on Air? Legend has it that a mysterious broadcast known as the "Midnight Channel" appears only on rainy nights. The day after it airs, a corpse is found in Inaba, a quiet and peaceful town in rural Japan suddenly thrown into turmoil. To uncover the truth behind these chilling mysteries, you and your friends form an investigation team to unravel the secrets of the Midnight Channel and the bizarre murders. As your adventure unfolds, you face off against "Shadows," eerie manifestations of individuals' darker selves. Together, you awaken a hidden power called "Persona" and embark on a journey to prevent more tragedies while uncovering the truth behind the chaos.

Releases.Name: Shatterswarm
Releases.Summary:
Shatterswarm is a narrative-driven 2D space shooter that combines direct ship combat, fleet command, tower defense, and base building into a strategic colony survival experience. Command Captain Hope's hero ship as you defend Earth's last bastion, The Citadel, against the relentless Voxan Empire.

Take control of your hero ship in intense 2D space combat while simultaneously building and managing a fleet of ships, constructing defensive networks around your citadel, and managing resources to survive wave after wave of alien invaders. Every decision matters as you balance offensive capabilities with defensive structures, all while facing unique enemy types that require different strategies to defeat.

The game features a diverse roster of challenging enemies, each with distinct mechanics: parasites that hack into and take control of your own ships, motherships that spawn smaller vessels, deflectors that fire your projectiles back at you, and robotic enemies that latch onto your ships an…
